evidences.title: Meeting Halfway: Binancians Across Space and Time Zones - Binance
evidences.content: ### _UTC 12-24:_ _APAC: Working from 12 to 19 UTC (7:00 PM to 2:00 AM local time)._ _Middle East: Working from 12 to 20 UTC (4:00 PM to 12:00 AM local time)._ _Europe/Africa: Working from 12 to 22 UTC (2:00 PM to 11:00 PM local time)._ _The Americas (-3 to -5): Full coverage from 12 to 24 UTC (9:00 AM to 9:00 PM local time)._ _The Americas (-6 to -7): Full coverage from 12 to 24 UTC (6:00 AM to 6:00 PM local time)._ ## Flexibility, Freedom, and Focus Across every region, the key benefit of remote work at Binance is the flexibility it offers. Whether it’s avoiding the daily commute or adjusting schedules around family life, employees consistently praise the freedom to design one’s workday on their own terms. [...] For YF, an Operations Lead based in Paris also at UTC+2, her time zone is the ultimate sweet spot. "I get to follow the usual working time, 9-6," she explains, allowing her to maintain a structured routine while still collaborating effectively with both Asia and Europe. MJ, Angels and Community Coordinator in Lisbon at UTC+1, is grateful for the productive overlap of other regions around his timezone. evidences.title: What is UTC time and why is it so important in the crypto world?
evidences.content: # 🕒 What is UTC time and why is it so important in the crypto world? | -BULLZEYE- on Binance Square Image 1: Binance Square Login Sign Up HomeTrending ArticlesNotificationProfileNewsBookmarksChatsHistoryCreator CenterSettings Article # 🕒 What is UTC time and why is it so important in the crypto world? Image 2 -BULLZEYE- Jul 27, 2025 Follow View Hidden Replies Report Block User If you've ever seen that a launch, presale, airdrop, or event says something like "Available at 12:00 PM UTC" and you thought that meant noon in your country... let me tell you something: you probably arrived late or too early. 🔹 What does UTC mean? UTC stands for Coordinated Universal Time. It is a base time that doesn't change with seasons or daylight saving time. [...] It's like the 'central clock' of the world. Everything is compared to UTC. 🌎 How do I know what time UTC is in my country? Each country has a time difference with respect to UTC. For example: Colombia, Peru, Ecuador, Panama = UTC -5 Mexico (CDMX) = UTC -6 Venezuela = UTC -4 Argentina, Chile = UTC -3 Spain = UTC +2 (in summer) 🧠 Real example: If a token is launched at 8:00 AM UTC, in: Colombia will be at 3:00 AM Venezuela will be at 4:00 A...

evidences.title: ET to UTC Converter - Time.now
evidences.content: EDT 9:00 AM → UTC 1:00 PM EDT 5:00 PM → UTC 9:00 PM 4-hour difference during summer International Coordination EST Midnight → UTC 5:00 AM EDT Midnight → UTC 4:00 AM UTC used for global scheduling Technical Applications Server logs → UTC timestamps API calls → UTC standards UTC preferred for technical systems #### Conversion Tips & Best Practices • Add 5 hours to EST (winter) or 4 hours to EDT (summer) to get UTC • UTC is the preferred standard for international business, aviation, and technical applications • UTC is also known as "Zulu Time" in military and aviation contexts • For practical purposes, UTC and GMT are the same, though UTC is the modern standard • Always use 24-hour format when expressing UTC time (no AM/PM) [...] CST to SGT Converter ET to BRT Converter BST to AEST Converter EST to Z Converter KST to ET Converter JST to WIB Converter KST to PT Converter KST to WIB Converter CAT to IST Converter NZST to IST Converter PT to PST Converter CET to SGT Converter PDT to WIB Converter GMT to WIB Converter KST to CT Converter CST to HKT Converter SGT to HKT Converter WAT to EAT Converter ET to KST Converter JST to GMT Converter EST to NPT Converter CST to PHT Converter CST...

evidences.title: How to Change Timezone on Binance - YouTube
evidences.content: # How to Change Timezone on Binance ## Your Digital Friend 4500 subscribers 11 likes ### Description 1024 views Posted: 5 May 2025 How to Change Timezone on Binance? If your charts or trading data on Binance don’t match your local time, it’s likely due to the default timezone settings. In this quick tutorial, I’ll show you how to change the timezone in your Binance account using the app or web version, so your trading records stay accurate and aligned with your region. \#Binance #BinanceTips #CryptoGuide #TradingTimezone #BinanceApp #CryptoSettings #BinanceTutorial #CryptoHelp #TechTips #Binance2025 Buy me a coffee (€1) on PayPal: 📧 For collaboration: novakdigitalfriend@gmail.com If you have any questions, please write them in the comment section below. [...] ### Transcript: [...] Tap on that to open the settings menu. Change and chart time zone. Tap on it. A list of available time zones will appear. These are sorted by region and UTC offset. Scroll through the list and find the time zone that matches your local time or whichever time zone you prefer for tracking your trades and charts. Once you tap on your desired time zone, it will be instantly applied. No need to manually sav...
